lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Hey, [player name], can you come and help me with some pheasants?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll help with your pheasants.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm busy.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Hey there, [player name]. Could you kill a pheasant with [two/three/four] tails, please? Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Hey there, [player name]. Can you kill the [2/3/4]-tailed pheasant please. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Hey there, [player name]. I need you to kill a pheasant that has [2/3/4] tails. Bring me the raw pheasant when you're done.

sections.title: Talking to the Forester as he leaves

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Now bring me the raw pheasant.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Thanks, [player name], you may use the portal to leave the area now.

sections.title: After killing the assigned pheasant, talking to Freaky Forester again

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Okay, [player name], you can leave the area now.

sections.title: Attempting to give the Freaky Forester a second pheasant

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: I don't need any more of those. You are free to exit the area now.

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: You get a lederhosen [hat/top/shorts] for your help, many thanks!

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: You get a lamp for your help, many thanks!

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: I'm looking for [player name].

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: [player name]!

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Hello? [player name]?

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Talk to me, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: [player name]? Are you there?!

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: I'd like to talk to you, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Freaky Forester
lines.text: Maybe later.
